所有类和接口

类
类
说明
Admin_CheckApplicationLimit
 
Admin_Course
 
Admin_CourseApplicationControl

AdminDashboardUI
 
AdminTest
 
Applicant
Entity class representing a TA applicant in the recruitment system.
ApplicationDialog
Boundary Class - Submit Application Dialog Uses JDialog to implement a modal dialog without leaving the main interface.
ApplicationRecord
Entity Class: Application Record * This class encapsulates all data related to a single job application submitted by a Teaching Assistant.
CVManagerDialog
Boundary Class - CV Manager Dialog (US-03) Allows TA to upload, view, and delete their CVs.
CVRecord
简历记录实体类 完美解决文件名重复和UI显示的问题
DashBoardUI
Abstract Boundary Class Base class for all specific dashboard UIs (Admin, MO, TA).
Job
Entity Class Encapsulates core data related to a job posting.
LoginController
Control Class Encapsulates the coordination and authentication logic.
LoginMain
This is a test class for Login page.
LoginUI
Boundary Class Models the interaction for user login.
MOApplicantListUI
 
MockDataManager
 
MODashboardUI
 
MODataStore
Central data persistence layer for the TA Recruitment System.
Module
Entity class representing a teaching module (course).
ModuleDataHandler
Backend logic for handling modules.csv data.
MOJobVacancyUI
 
MOMessageTAUI
 
MOReviewApplicationsUI
Review Applications UI - Distinct from Applicant List.
MOScheduleInterviewsUI
 
MyApplicationsDialog
Boundary Class - My Applications Dialog (US-07 and US-08) Upgraded from Sprint 1 basic shell.
TAController
Control Class: TA Controller Handles the core business logic, data routing, and persistence (mock database) for the Teaching Assistant application system.
TADashboardUI
Boundary Class - TA Dashboard Implements a Master-Detail view with advanced filtering capabilities.
TATest
Application entry point Responsible for instantiating the Control and binding it to the Boundary.
User
Entity Class Represents a user in the system.
